plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Franco's code style preferences: expressive naming, fluent interfaces, early returns, Laravel-style comments, Stripe-style docs.

plugins.name: skill-design-philosophy
plugins.description: Design philosophy for creating outstanding Claude Code skills. Use when creating a new skill, improving an existing skill, or designing script interfaces.

plugins.name: polish
plugins.description: Polish a codebase by reviewing it for simplifications, unifications, and reduced cognitive load. Convenes Otwell, DHH, Wathan, and Porzio as parallel reviewers. Report-only by default; --interactive confirms and implements.
